name: Beef Boulette Burgers
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Mushrooms (use 1 4-oz can of mushroom stems and pieces, drained and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together.
2. Shape the mixture into 8 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Broil or grill the patties 4-inches from the heat, turning once, until the desired doneness is reached (about 10 to 15 minutes).
